testcase.name: test_client_contact_send_message
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration82_ui_improvements.py:145: in test_client_contact_send_message assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_health_score_v2

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing 'score' in response assert 'score' in {'areas_for_improvement': [None, None, 'Reduce debt levels', 'Boost retirement contributions'], 'component_scores': {'debt_management': 50.0, 'diversification': 65, 'emergency_fund': 100, 'insurance_coverage': 85, ...}, 'grade': 'C', 'grade_description': 'Fair', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration82_ui_improvements.py:174: in test_health_score_v2 assert "score" in data, "Missing 'score' in response" E AssertionError: Missing 'score' in response E assert 'score' in {'areas_for_improvement': [None, None, 'Reduce debt levels', 'Boost retirement contributions'], 'component_scores': {'debt_management': 50.0, 'diversification': 65, 'emergency_fund': 100, 'insurance_coverage': 85, ...}, 'grade': 'C', 'grade_description': 'Fair', ...}
